payload.query: What is the next grounded reflection for the active governed automation task "Review dry-run soak audit signals" in phase "30m Heartbeat Dry-Run Soak Test"?
groundedNodeLabels: Review 30m dry-run soak evidence against promotion gate
Dry-run soak evidence is reviewed against the gate and any missing proof is explicit.
Promotion criteria are explicit, auditable, and stricter than the dry-run soak baseline.
Run a bounded unattended 30m dry-run heartbeat against real governed work and verify safety signals before unattended execution is allowed.
Execute-mode promotion criteria are explicit, governed, and stricter than dry-run soak success alone.
recommendedNextActions: Implement soak produces enough evidence to judge whether unattended execution is safe to promote
